title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For April 2023
text: NOBL gave up a big chunk of its January gains in February, finishing the month down 2.36%. March has seen the ETF tumble some more as it's down 1.88% through 3/29. I present 3 strategies that can theoretically beat the dividend aristocrat index in the long term.

title: 4 Recession-Ready REITs
text: I just finished an updated article titled “The Answer is 9” and I referenced the fact that cap rates have risen faster than I've seen in my 30+ year career. I'm recommending a more cautious and tactical approach since certain REITs that have shortened duration of debt, increases their risk.

title: Retire Rich With This 6%-Yielding Dividend Aristocrat Portfolio
text: The banking crisis of 2023 is likely to push America into recession, possibly within four months. Stocks will likely sell off 15% to 30% before a new face-ripping bull market begins.

title: 18 Upcoming Dividend Increases To Finish Q1
text: All these stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average increase of 11.0% and a median increase of 8.4%.

title: Yields Plunge, REITs Crater
text: Tired of hearing "rates up, REITs down?" Same here. There are more factors to consider. Treasury yields are falling as more investors recognize the death of inflation and call for rates to be cut by the end of the year.

title: Residential REITs: Stability In An Unstable World
text: The recent collapse of Silicon Valley Bank and the launch of the Federal Reserve's Bank Term Funding Program (“BTFP”) have sent markets on a roller-coaster ride. Recent housing data continues to show signs of home prices moving lower, and sequential asking rents in several major apartment markets has been moving lower as well.

title: The 4 Dividend Aristocrat Buys For March
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years." --Kiplinger.com/Investing. 67 Aristocrats screened as of March 8, 2023, represented all eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker estimated top ten net gains ranged 16.32%-32.64% topped by WBA & VFC.

title: 3 Passive Income Powerhouses to Stock Up on Now
text: Realty Income is one of the most reliable dividend REITs that pays its dividends monthly. There's nothing more powerful than industrial REITs like Stag Industrial, with long-term, stable tenants and increasing dividends.

title: Essex Property Trust to Present at The 2023 Citigroup Global Property CEO Conference
text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) announced today that Michael J. Schall, President and CEO, will be participating in a roundtable presentation at the 2023 Citigroup Global Property CEO Conference held in Hollywood, FL on Monday, March 6, 2023, at 4:20 p.m. Eastern Time. To listen to the panel, please visit the webcast link on the Investors section of the Company's website at www.essex.com.
